# hrobot_subnet (Data Source)

Look up a single subnet managed in Hetzner Robot.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hrobot_subnet" "example" {
  ip = "2001:db8:1234::"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) Subnet network address to look up.

### Read-Only

- `failover` (Boolean) Whether this is a failover subnet.
- `gateway` (String) Subnet gateway.
- `locked` (Boolean) Whether the subnet is locked.
- `mask` (Number) Subnet mask (CIDR bits).
- `server_ip` (String) Main IP of the owning server.
- `server_number` (Number) Number of the owning server.
- `traffic_daily` (Number) Daily traffic warning threshold (MB).
- `traffic_hourly` (Number) Hourly traffic warning threshold (MB).
- `traffic_monthly` (Number) Monthly traffic warning threshold (GB).
- `traffic_warnings` (Boolean) Whether traffic warnings are enabled.
